description_long: This is a round chocolate cake with a textured exterior resembling chocolate shavings or flakes, giving it a rustic and rich appearance. The top of the cake is decorated with five evenly spaced dollops of white cream, each topped with a glossy red cherry or cherry-like confection. A single white candle is placed at the center of the cake, suggesting it is intended for a celebration. The cake's surface is slightly uneven due to the chocolate shavings, and the overall color palette is dominated by deep browns, bright reds, and white accents. The cake appears dense and moist, likely with a soft interior beneath the decorative exterior. No display container or plate is visible beneath the cake.
description: A round chocolate cake with chocolate shavings, five cream and cherry decorations, and a single white candle at the center. The cake has a rustic, celebratory look with rich brown, red, and white colors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central candle and all five cream and cherry decorations clearly spaced around the top.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the texture of the chocolate shavings and the arrangement of the cherries and cream.
description_view_2: Another angled view with the candle centered and the decorations visible, emphasizing the cake's roundness and surface detail.
description_view_3: View showing the cake's side texture and the distribution of the toppings, with the candle still prominent in the center.
